frames: The agent stands upright, with its right arm bent and raised, and its left arm slightly bent.
The agent bends its torso forward and to the left, bringing both arms closer to its chest.
The agent continues to bend forward and to the left, extending its right arm slightly and keeping its left arm bent.
The agent straightens its torso slightly, bringing its right arm up towards its head and its left arm down.
The agent bends its torso forward again, with its right arm bent and raised, and its left arm extended downwards.
The agent leans further forward and to the left, extending both arms outwards and downwards.
The agent's torso is significantly bent forward and to the left, with its arms extended, appearing to lose balance.
The agent is falling forward and to the left, with its body nearly parallel to the ground and its limbs splayed.
